title: One-Click Domain Swap
description: Switch between development, staging, QA, and production environments instantly while preserving the full URL path and query parameters.

title: Folder Organization
description: Organize your domains into collapsible folders with custom icons and colors. Supports nested folders for complex project structures.

title: Keyboard Shortcuts
description: Open the popup with Alt+D or instantly swap to your last used domain with Alt+Shift+D. Fully customizable shortcuts.

title: Smart Protocol Handling
description: Configure protocol per domain — force HTTP, HTTPS, or preserve the current protocol. Global Force HTTPS option available.

title: Import & Export
description: Backup your entire configuration to JSON and restore it anytime. Easily share setups with your team or transfer between browsers.

title: Chrome Sync
description: Sync your domains and settings across all your Chrome browsers automatically. Your setup follows you everywhere.
